assertions.evidence: A markdown table with columns: Scenario | Shipping Type | Order Value | Destination | Cost? is present in the response

assertions.text: Destination/country is blank (or absent from the table) for standard and express shipping rows — not filled with a dummy value or 'ANY'
assertions.evidence: Standard and Express rows have empty Destination cells: '| Standard      | £10.00      |             | £3.99  |' and '| Express       | £49.99      |             | £9.99  |' — explicitly noted: 'not filled with ANY or N/A'

assertions.text: Overnight rows include an explicit UK destination value (not blank), since availability depends on it
assertions.evidence: Both overnight rows have 'UK' in the Destination column: '| Overnight     | £30.00      | UK          | £14.99 |'

assertions.text: At least one output column ends with '?'
assertions.evidence: Column 'Cost?' is the output column, ending with '?'

assertions.text: Table includes rows for all three shipping types: standard, express, and overnight
assertions.evidence: Table contains rows with Shipping Type values: Standard (2 rows), Express (3 rows), Overnight (2 rows)
